rag_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line
Use comparison expressions for bool, integer arithmetic for int, and real arithmetic for real
Remove guarantees with <error> types instead of adding architecture
Align assumed and actual types in helper declarations and expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for helper declarations and assign for output assignments in implementation scope
Use const for constant declarations with valid scalar types
Use guarantee only in component type scope for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use guarantees with <error> types
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
